response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of financial systems development or Windows-based C++ work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development experience
Proven track record in open-source contributions and tooling
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ or Windows platform experience in resume
Absence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but no mention of SQL Server or Oracle as required

key_factors.factor: SQL skills unverified for required databases
